# Centric Group

> Architectural plans, permits, kitchen and bath remodels, tile, and drywall — South Florida.

## Summary
Centric Group is a general contractor focused on residential remodeling: drawings and permits through finished interiors.

## Process
Homepage includes a “How we work” section: discovery → plans → permits → build/protection → inspections & handoff.

## Primary pages
- / — Home
- /projects — Project gallery
- /services — Services (plans, permits, kitchen, bath, tile, drywall)
- /about — About
- /reviews — Client reviews
- /contact — Contact
- /service-areas — Service areas (30+ South Florida cities & counties; /location is the same page)

## Contact
Use /contact for project inquiries. Phone and email appear in the site footer.

## Language
English (US).
